metadata.title: SPOT-OD v1.2.3 ACF holdout audit release
metadata.description: Release-facing metadata for SPOT-OD v1.2.3, a version-pinned supplementary evidence package for a simulator-bound sparse-visibility orbit-determination self-audit record. This release repairs the public release boundary for the AdaptiveCandidateFusion audit/table tier by packaging the fixed-soft full-training summaries, the 15-seed validation-selected global scenario portfolio, and the development/holdout split summaries under results/adaptive_candidate_fusion_global_scenario_portfolio_dev10_holdout5_20260624/. The v1.2.3 Zenodo DOI and record are pending/expected after Zenodo imports the new GitHub release. The v1.2.2 DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20822968 and record https://zenodo.org/records/20822968 remain the historical ACF audit package before this public-boundary repair. The v1.2.1 DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20811701 remains the historical GraphAnchorPairGate package. Scientific metrics are as recorded, not upgraded to operational validation. The development/holdout readout is weak/mixed internal compact-simulator evidence, not operational precise-reference validation, not independent-machine reproduction, not third-party validation, not full raw/training/all-filter reproduction, and not confirmatory learned superiority.
metadata.notes: Version 1.2.3 targets the GitHub release https://github.com/Alavi1412/spot-od-reproduction/releases/tag/v1.2.3-acf-holdout-audit. Zenodo DOI/record fields are pending until Zenodo imports that GitHub release. The paired GitHub release asset is spot_od_v1_2_3_acf_holdout_audit_review_archive.zip; its local regenerated bytes and SHA-256 are recorded in release/SUPPLEMENTARY_MANIFEST.json under review_archive. Version 1.2.2 remains archived at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20822968 as historical ACF audit package history. Version 1.2.1 remains archived at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20811701 as historical GraphAnchorPairGate package history. Scientific metrics are as recorded, not upgraded to operational validation.
